title: Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A flavor-packed recipe featuring marinated chicken breast, grilled to perfection on skewers with a hint of sweetness.
instructions: Thread chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a little space between each.
In a small bowl, mix together melted sugar, brown sugar, and brazilian seasoning.
Brush olive oil onto both sides of the chicken.
Season the chicken with the sugar mixture.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
